message:
Merge polecat/onyx/bd-5nn: add default values to wisps table NOT NULL TEXT columns

fix: add default values to wisps table NOT NULL TEXT columns (bd-5nn)

files.patch:
@@ -57,10 +57,10 @@ const wispsTableSchema = `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wisps (
     id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
     content_hash VARCHAR(64),
     title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
-    description TEXT NOT NULL,
-    design TEXT NOT NULL,
-    acceptance_criteria TEXT NOT NULL,
-    notes TEXT NOT NULL,
+    description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+    design TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+    acceptance_criteria TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+    notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
     status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
     priority INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
     issue_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'task',
